one_time_description: Income from CFB Lands claim settlement (land sale proceeds from federal government settlement related to lands in Chilliwack)
economic_notes: First Nation is member of Stó:lo Nation located in Fraser Valley near Chilliwack BC. Involved in forestry, environmental monitoring, property rental and management, and real property acquisition through various GBE partnerships. SAY Lands building under construction jointly with Aitchelitz and Yakweakwioose First Nations to be transferred to a newly formed cooperative post year-end. Construction costs to date $7,194,745. Contingent liability for on-reserve loan program guarantees of $622,223 and housing mortgage guarantees of $213,750.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024. The nation has 1 fully consolidated subsidiary (Skowkale Taxation Centre) and 8 GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis. SAY Lands building ($7.19M construction cost) expected to be transferred post year-end to a new cooperative with Aitchelitz and Yakweakwioose First Nations — this is a significant subsequent event. total_government_transfers estimated as all transfers from ISC, CMHC, FNEHA, MCFD, MoTI, Province of BC, SAY Lands, FNESC, Sto:lo Service Agency, School District #33, Gaming revenue, and Property taxes. osr calculated as total revenue minus total_government_transfers. No remuneration schedule included in document. Current liabilities not separately disclosed on face of balance sheet in extracted text. Cash includes internally and externally restricted amounts totalling $10,114,283 with remainder unrestricted.
